__NOTOC__
== Welcome to {{SITENAME}}! ==
This wiki is mainly dedicated to covering Shinto and Shinto shrines. This wiki has a broad focus on Japanese religion, culture, and history.

We have [https://shinto.miraheze.org/wiki/Special:PrefixIndex?prefix=&namespace=0&hideredirects=1&stripprefix=1 {{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} articles] and counting.

== Tasks ==

See [[User:EmmaBot]] for current tasks being done cleaning up this wiki

=== Current tasks ===

* Clearing the massive histories of pages to make the wiki no longer cause issues for miraheze
* Updating the task list here

=== Future tasks ===
* Hopefully Miraheze will accept our new structure. But there are long term concerns
[[Category:Uncategorized pages]]
[[Category:Pages without wikidata]]
[[Category:git synced pages]]
